name: Gene Allen
abstract: Eugene Sufana Allen (December 5, 1928 – February 14, 2008) was an American jazz reedist, who primarily played baritone saxophone and bass clarinet.

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Andre
about_quotes.evidence: I think Gene Allen was playing baritone... Trombone were Jimmy Knepper, Willie Dennis and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Andre interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 7, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Sauter
about_quotes.evidence: That was the road band. We spent weeks with auditions at Carol's studio and we got Harvey Estrom there and Al Block and Ray Sheiner, Wally King--God bless Wally, Gene Allen; good players.

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Shiner
about_quotes.evidence: Any guy in that band, dear friends, cohorts. Gene Allen played baritone...
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Shiner interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 11, 1998
